document.title: Template for a Field Safety Notice Distributor/Importer Reply Form

sourceSummary.oneLine: Rev 1 July 2018 template for a Field Safety Notice Distributor/Importer Reply Form.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used for distributors/importers to confirm receipt, reading and understanding of a Field Safety Notice and to provide evidence for monitoring corrective action progress.
keyPoints: The form captures FSN reference number, FSN date, product/device name, product codes, and batch or serial numbers.
Distributor/importer details include company name, address, contact name, telephone number, and email.

Distributor/importer actions include stock checking, inventory quarantine, customer identification, customer notification, reply confirmation, affected device return, affected device destruction, or confirmation that no affected devices are in inventory.
The organisation's reply is stated to be evidence needed to monitor the progress of corrective actions.

entities.name: Field Safety Notice
entities.evidence: Template for a Field Safety Notice Distributor/Importer Reply Form

entities.name: Organisation
entities.evidence: It is important that your organisation takes the actions detailed in the FSN and confirms that you have received the FSN.

concepts.name: Receipt acknowledgement
concepts.evidence: I confirm the receipt, the reading and understanding of the Field Safety Notice.

concepts.name: Inventory quarantine
concepts.evidence: I have checked my stock and quarantined inventory

concepts.name: Customer notification
concepts.evidence: I have informed the identified customers of this FSN

concepts.name: Corrective action progress monitoring
concepts.pageTarget: Field Safety Corrective Action Progress Monitoring
concepts.evidence: Your organisation's reply is the evidence we need to monitor the progress of the corrective actions.

evidence.claim: The document is Rev 1 dated July 2018.
evidence.pageTarget: Template for a Field Safety Notice Distributor Importer Reply Form

evidence.claim: The document is a template for a Field Safety Notice Distributor/Importer Reply Form.
evidence.evidenceText: Template for a Field Safety Notice Distributor/Importer Reply Form

evidence.claim: The form includes a Field Safety Notice information section with FSN reference number, FSN date, product/device name, product codes, and batch or serial numbers.
evidence.evidenceText: 1. Field Safety Notice (FSN) information FSN Reference number* Pre-filled by manufacturer FSN Date* Pre-filled by manufacturer Product/ Device name* Pre-filled by manufacturer Product Code(s) ... Batch/Serial Number (s)

evidence.claim: The form captures distributor/importer details including company name, address, contact name, telephone number, and email.
evidence.evidenceText: 2. Distributor/Importer Details Company Name* Account Number Address* ... Contact Name* Title or Function Telephone number* Email*

evidence.claim: The distributor/importer is expected to confirm receipt, reading, and understanding of the Field Safety Notice.
evidence.evidenceText: I confirm the receipt, the reading and understanding of the Field Safety Notice.

evidence.claim: Distributor/importer response actions may include checking stock and quarantining inventory.
evidence.evidenceText: I have checked my stock and quarantined inventory

evidence.claim: Distributor/importer response actions may include identifying customers that received or may have received the device.
evidence.evidenceText: I have identified customers that received or may have received this device

evidence.claim: Distributor/importer response actions may include informing identified customers of the FSN.
evidence.evidenceText: I have informed the identified customers of this FSN

evidence.claim: Distributor/importer response actions may include returning or destroying affected devices with quantity, lot or serial number, and date information.
evidence.evidenceText: I have returned affected devices - enter number of devices returned Add quantity, Lot/Serial Number/Date Returned ... I have destroyed affected devices – enter number destroyed and date complete.

evidence.claim: The organisation's reply is used as evidence to monitor progress of corrective actions.
evidence.evidenceText: Your organisation's reply is the evidence we need to monitor the progress of the corrective actions.
evidence.pageTarget: Field Safety Corrective Action Progress Monitoring

reviewFlags.reason: No specific authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal metadata indicates MFDS/domestic but the document text itself does not state this.
No specific product model or device name is provided; product/device name is shown only as a field to be pre-filled by the manufacturer.
No standards are cited in the source text.
The form contains placeholder fields for FSN reference number, FSN date, product/device name, and sender details rather than completed values.
